aiInstruction: Research span, deckWidth, towerHeight before STRUCTURE typology:suspension_bridge. layout.skeleton_type=SPAN_SUSPENSION; global_constraints.symmetry=MIRROR_X. 指名金门大桥时 reference_landmark=golden_gate_bridge；泛悬索桥可省略 reference。components 只允许一个 STRUCTURE+typology:suspension_bridge（可选 PAVING/PATH 外围）；禁止与 typology STRUCTURE 并存的 MASS_MAIN、MASS_SECONDARY、TOWER、ROOF、ENTRANCE、FOUNDATION、FACADE_WINDOWS、DECOR_DETAIL——双塔/主缆/吊索/桥面均由解释器生成。proportion_hints 仅用桥梁比例（span_to_tower_height≈4.0、cable_sag_ratio≈0.12、deck_to_tower_width）；禁止房屋比例（height_to_width、floor_cornice、repeating_pattern 柱窗节奏）。禁止用单一 PATH 折线代替双塔主缆体系。
